import cv2
import numpy as np
import pytesseract
from pdf2image import convert_from_path

pytesseract.pytesseract.tesseract_cmd = r'C:\\Program Files\\Tesseract-OCR\\tesseract.exe'
POPPLER_PATH = r'C:\\poppler-25.12.0\\Library\\bin'

pages = convert_from_path\('Complete-FMR-Conventional-February-2026.pdf', dpi=150, poppler_path=POPPLER_PATH, first_page=13, last_page=13\)
img = cv2.cvtColor\(np.array\(pages[0]\), cv2.COLOR_BGR2GRAY\)
text = pytesseract.image_to_string\(img, config='--oem 3 --psm 6'\)

lines = text.splitlines\(\)
for i, line in enumerate\(lines\):
    if 'top' in line.lower\(\) and 'holding' in line.lower\(\):
        print\(f'{i}: {line}'\)
    if 'characteristic' in line.lower\(\):
        print\(f'{i}: {line}'\)
")
